description: Exclusively launched on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — Surprise Military Attack Coin (SURPRISE) draws from the concept of a sudden and unexpected military attack that creates a decisive advantage in human history. SURPRISE delivers its holders, traders, and users instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fees, and AI contract capability, making it a high-velocity, superior digital asset worldwide.
name: Surprise Military Attack Coin
